Objects.Name: [Module] Power Star Spawner
Objects.Notes: A controller that spawns a power star through switches.

Classes.Notes: An object that causes a Power Star to appear once its SW_A gets activated. The Power Star will appear from the object's position or the player's position if Obj_arg4 is set.

Obj_arg0.Name: Power Star ID
Obj_arg0.Description: The ID of the Power Star to be spawned.

Obj_arg2.Name: Spawn Delay
Obj_arg2.Description: How long it takes for the star to spawn once activated.

Obj_arg3.Name: Use Sound Effect?
Obj_arg3.Description: If set, the star appearance sound will play.

Obj_arg4.Name: Use Mario's Position?
Obj_arg4.Description: If set, the star will appear from the player's position.

Obj_arg6.Name: Y Offset
Obj_arg6.Description: The Y offset for spawning from the player's position. Requires obj_arg4 to be set. Default is 300.

SW_A.Description: Causes the Power Star to appear once this switch gets activated.

AppearPowerStar.Description: Spawns once its SW_A gets activated.
